messages.content:
This city has a _____ of around 300,000.
(Баллов: 1)


population

people

tourists
This city has a population of around 300,000.

That part of town is _____ . These streets are safer.
(Баллов: 1)


empty

dangerous

noisy
That part of town is dangerous. These streets are safer.

You can buy anything at the _____ in the town centre.
(Баллов: 1)


cathedral

palace

department store
You can buy anything at the department store in the town centre.

Rome has some amazing _____ buildings.
(Баллов: 1)


history

historical

cathedrals
Rome has some amazing historical buildings.

I’m not really interested _____ history. Are you?
(Баллов: 1)


in

of

about
I’m not really interested in history. Are you?

Alina can’t swim. She’s frightened _____ the water.
(Баллов: 1)


with

of

at
Alina can’t swim. She’s frightened of the water.

Italy is famous _____ making the best ice-cream.
(Баллов: 1)


of

by

for
Italy is famous for making the best ice-cream.

Are you interested _____ football?
(Баллов: 1)


in

to

at
Are you interested in football?

Alex loves reading. His flat is full _____ books.
(Баллов: 1)


with

by

of
Alex loves reading. His flat is full of books.

I’m not very good _____ tennis. I prefer volleyball.
(Баллов: 1)


in

with

at
I’m not very good at tennis. I prefer volleyball.

I’ve __________ talking to him. 
(Баллов: 1)


done

stopped

dreamed
I’ve stopped talking to him.

We __________ going to the beach.
(Баллов: 1)


love

need

want
We love going to the beach.

He doesn’t __________ driving.
(Баллов: 1)


good

want

mind
He doesn’t mind driving.

Mariam’s __________ in history.
(Баллов: 1)


excited

interested

happy
Mariam’s interested in history.

My brother’s __________ of studying law.
(Баллов: 1)


thinking

spending

hoping
My brother’s thinking of studying law.

I __________ to go to the supermarket.
(Баллов: 1)


mind

think

need
I need to go to the supermarket.

I’d __________ to go out this weekend.
(Баллов: 1)


like

mind

think
I’d like to go out this weekend.

Do you __________ reading?
(Баллов: 1)


want

think

enjoy
Do you enjoy reading?

Peter __________ a lot of time watching TV.
(Баллов: 1)


does

spends

has
Peter spends a lot of time watching TV.

I’m _____ about the exam. I’ve done a lot of work.
(Баллов: 1)


not very

a bit worried
I’m a bit worried about the exam. I’ve done a lot of work.

Yulia’s __________ friendly. She talks to everybody.
(Баллов: 1)


really

a bit
Yulia’s really friendly. She talks to everybody.

He’s ____ motivated because he wants to get a good job.
(Баллов: 1)


a bit

really
He’s really motivated because he wants to get a good job.

This exercise is ____ hard. We can’t do it!
(Баллов: 1)


not very

incredibly
This exercise is incredibly hard. We can't do it!

I find listening exercises ____difficult.
(Баллов: 1)


a bit

very
I find listening exercises a bit difficult.

This question is _____ complicated.
(Баллов: 1)


bit

quite
This question is quite complicated.

Of course, I can ride a bike, it’s ____ easy.
(Баллов: 1)


not very

really
Of course, I can ride a bike, it’s really easy.
